title: Gaveno Cavalia Extra Soft QUILTED MATTRESS PROTECTOR White Single
features: EFFECTIVE MATTRESS PROTECTION: This fabulously comfortable quilted mattress protector is the ideal aid to prolong the life of your valuable bedding items, guarding against spills, tears and other damage.

WARM AND COSY: The insulating quilted design helps retain heat, allowing you to snuggle up and stay warm and cozy throughout the night, allowing you to get the rest you deserve, no matter the low temperatures outside.

MACHINE WASHABLE: Crafted from easy care fabric, this elegant quilted mattress protector is machine washable so you can look after your fabulous new purchase stress-free in the comfort and convenience of your own home.

SUPREME SOFTNESS: Exquisite, high-quality material is used in the creation of this stunning, waterproof bedding item and feels wonderfully soft and smooth against your skin, providing you with the luxurious bedtime experience you have been searching for.
FABULOUSLY DURABLE: Expertly crafted from superb materials with the greatest of care, this exquisite bedding item could be enhancing your home and bringing you comfort for a long time to come
description: Product Description " QUILTED MATTRESS PROTECTOR ★ Non Allergenic. Gaveno Cavailia comfort Mattress Protector with a feeling of relief and consolation. ★ Relax, unwind and enjoy the natural softness and relief. Organic elements and modern technology add refreshing style to luxury living. ★ Protector Fabric retains its natural softness to give you an extra luxury. Capable of withstanding wear and tear or Decay. ★ A durable fabric, able to perform or compete over a long period, as by avoiding and overcoming damages to your mattresses. ★ Draws moisture away from skin to help balance body temperature. Quality Mattress protectors with Hollow Fiber Polyester filling. ★ Sizes Available: Cot Bed: 70 x 140 x 25 cm (28 x 55 x 10 In) Single: 90 x 190 x 25 cm (35 x 75 x 10 In) 4FT Small Double: 122 x 190 x 25 cm (48 x 75 x 10 In) Double: 137 x 190 x 25 cm (54 x 75 x 10 In) King: 150 x 200 x 25 cm (60 x 79 x 10 In) Super King: 180 x 200 x 30 cm (71 x 79 x 12 In) ★ Included: 1x Quilted Mattress Proctector ★ Colour: White ★ Material: Polycotton 50% Cotton, 50% Polyester Filling -100% Polyester ★ Machine Washable: Do not Tumble Dry Wash Dark Colours Separately Machine Washable at 40°C Wash before use Do not bleach ★ Brand: Gaveno Cavailia® " Box Contains 1 x Mattress Protector
